records: scalar value and native derivative contract; no callback or persistent caller state
bounded-order signed definite integration with exact 3*K workspace
interpolation-knot, banded-workspace, and endpoint construction surface requires a separate reviewed constructor
multi-derivative output requires a checked derivative-table representation and distinct cached interval-state contract
basis-vector workspace and interval-state API is not required for the representation facade
weighted callback containment requires a separate callback audit
exact B-spline-to-PP conversion is exposed by the piecewise-polynomial feature
PP storage and evaluation are owned by the piecewise-polynomial feature
non-executable package documentation, not a numerical entry point
